description: Set custom data for the task. Tooltip will be drawn in task list on the right side. Description will be drawn in task description panel on the bottom.
examples: <sqf>_task setSimpleTaskCustomData ["\A3\Ui_f\data\IGUI\Cfg\simpleTasks\letters\h_ca.paa", "This is the tooltip", "This is the description"];</sqf>
name: setSimpleTaskCustomData

Item.desc: task the custom data are being added to
Item.name: task

Item.desc: text displayed next to the icon; max. 3 charactersc
Item.name: tooltip

Item.desc: text displayed on the task description panel; html format
Item.name: description
